name: Black Forest Parfait
recipeIngredient: 1 can (12 oz) red sour pitted cherries
3 ounces Jell-O sugar-free instant chocolate pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cream cheese with 1/4 cup skim milk on low speed of an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add the remaining milk and pudding mix, then continue mixing for 1-2 minutes until smooth.
3. Mix the cornstarch in the cherry juice until dissolved.
4. Cook the mixture with cherries over high heat until it boils for about 1 minute.
5. Remove from heat and stir in Equal sweetener.
6. Alternately spoon the pudding and cherries into parfait dishes, ending with pudding.
7. Garnish with 2 cherries.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 116, fat 3.5gm, cholesterol 14mg, carbohydrate 16g, sodium 304mg.
Exchanges: Bread 1/2, milk 1/2, fruit 1/2, fat 1.
